name: Spaghetti Herb & Spice Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 package Mix & Eat Cream of Wheat (or 3 tablespoons Quick-cooking Cream of Wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the dried minced onions in a blender on high for about 2 minutes.
2. Add the dried minced onions and blend for just a few seconds.
3. Store at room temperature to use within 3 months.
To Use:
1. Combine the tomato paste, herb mix, and butter.
2. Heat on medium heat, stirring constantly until piping hot.
3. Serve with 8 oz of pasta.
